why: Reworked all 11 @rubric scenarios on sdd/ssa-lowering so the instrument can register a miss (#221, Refs #211). Issue named 3 scenarios; conductor audit found ALL 11 repeat one authoring template -- [live 3] + [restatement/procedural 3] + [presence 2], threshold = max-2 -- so the bar was clearable by a doctrine scoring 1 of 3 on the only dimension measuring judgment. Owner widened scope to all 11 in-session. Surgery: deleted presence-grading (reasoning-recorded x3, provenance-kept) and moved shown-work to a new boolean guard (presence -> boolean guard, judgment -> rubric); folded 12 restatement/entailment dims into what they restate (clearest: not-optimistic = conservative-default negated); dropped the -before-lowering clause (procedural compliance, not judgment). Thresholds max-2 -> sum(max)-1 on 10/11. Doctrine (SKILL.md) untouched -- the instrument was broken, not the doctrine. Givens untouched: PR #215 already re-cut them off the worked examples and Given surgery is a proven dead end. Cold aced-spec-validator round 2: oracle/builder/architect all PASS, ALIGNED true, BLOCKER null, floors hand-verified below threshold on all 11 (most 0). Zero open markers. pnpm verify 21/21. THREE weaknesses DECLARED not hidden: irreducible not yet trustworthy (Given hands over both graded answers; a parroting doctrine can plausibly reach threshold -- needs a Given edit, out of scope); misaligned has the thinnest measured margin (5.33 vs 5) and this pass added load to it; cohesion is 1-dim at threshold=max with no genuine second facet available (padding would reintroduce the #221 defect) -- impl gate measures it, action pre-registered (below 3.0 mean on a correct doctrine -> demote to boolean, never pad). Residual risk is all false-RED, the correct direction for an instrument whose measured defect was false-GREEN. Clearance did NOT fire: #215 removed @frozen and never restored it, so the node was already re-opened; this gate re-freezes. Round 1 was REJECTED by the cold judge (correction line logged): it silently reverted merged PR #215 because the mission branch was cut from a pre-#215 base -- fixed by fast-forwarding onto the target and redoing the surgery on #215's Givens. HIGH blast (SDD planning doctrine contract); leash auto-none -- human-ratified in-session by unional.

Cold aced-impl-judge ran the full frozen suite N=3: IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true, BLOCKER null, all 19 scenarios pass, 66/66 dimension-scores at ceiling against the correct doctrine. Scoped re-verification after the cohesion demotion: 3/3 on all three changed scenarios. pnpm verify 21/21, rebased onto the current target (origin/main 35bd7a47, no conflicts, PR #246 did not touch this node). DISCRIMINATION MEASURED, NOT ASSERTED -- the whole point of this CR, since this node's prior gate ASSERTED its rubrics were discriminating by inspection and two cold judges later measured that FALSE. Two independent measurements: (1) ABLATION (delete a doctrine rule, re-score blind): barrier 6.00->3.67 FAIL 3/3; misaligned 6.00->2.33 FAIL 2/3; irreducible 5.00->3.33 FAIL 2/3. (2) PAIRED MUTATION (42 producer runs, 60 judge runs, two-stage so the rubric is the only variable): the SAME over-merged plan scores OLD 8>=6 PASS 3/3 and NEW 3<5 FAIL 3/3, zero variance, with real-doctrine controls green. The old instrument could not register that miss. Two defects the SPEC gate passed and only MEASUREMENT caught, both fixed by Oracle-lens revert: fleet-rebase-reasoned graded a rule the doctrine never states (1,1,2 against a correct doctrine -> demoted to a boolean guard); cohesion-preserved was UNLOSEABLE (rule deleted whole -> still 3/3, judges scoring it off single-writer) -> demoted to a boolean guard, so all 10 remaining rubrics carry 2 independently-loseable dimensions at sum(max)-1 with NO exceptions. THREE LIMITS DECLARED not buried: irreducible binds only ~2/3 (its Given hands over both graded answers); misaligned reds a correct doctrine ~1/3 for #249's reason (the scenario's situation matches the suite's OWN @trigger do-not-run exclusion -- a suite self-contradiction, not a rubric fault); N=3 cannot distinguish p=1.0 from p=0.9, so the barrier guard's fix is SUPPORTED not PROVEN. Scope held: SKILL.md changed only to remove its stale self-description of being graded and to name the rebase/fan-out sequencing its own Decision-evidence omitted -- never to fit the rubric (that move was explicitly rejected and recorded). #215's re-cut Givens verified byte-intact throughout. Absorption (#220/#222) observed and reported as data, never acted on -- this CR raises the bar against a sloppy doctrine, never a memorizing one. Follow-ups filed: #243 (checks fail open on 6 unparseable suites), #244 (ACED accepts unloseable dimensions), #245 (aced-case-judge scalar contract), #249 (misaligned/@trigger contradiction), #250 (cohesion over-split probe). HIGH blast; leash auto-none -- human-ratified in-session by unional. Closes #221.
